raw_consumer_statement: Found out that the phone number was changed on my XXXX account. Called XXXX and told them that that was not my number. Was told by XXXX that the phone number was changed on the XXXX or XXXX - can not remember which. Found out that over XXXX XXXX in purchases were made. from XX/XX/XXXX through XXXX. Maybe the one on the XXXX was me but i can not tell because not able to see the charges. Called XXXX  and told them. they initially reversed the charges. Then in XXXX place the charges back on my card. Called again and stated that the phone number on XXXX was not mine and the items were picked up in Florida. I do not live in Florida. They stated again that they would look at charges and received letter again stating previous decision stands. Purchases were XX/XX/XXXX {$66.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$23.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$3.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$650.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$520.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$790.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$24.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$1000.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$15.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$520.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$2600.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$25.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$10000.00}
